objective: Extend the worker write-set by exactly one read-only receipt validator and three connected test modules so the mandatory settlement parent is enforced end to end.
executable_blocker: The lifecycle authority requires SettlementReceipt.object_id in ExecutionReceipt parent refs, while the canonical validation boundary rejects every parent chain beyond checkpoint, artifacts and ledger; the original worker write-set cannot close the connected gate.

compatibility_contract.source_change_limit: validation.py may only recognize and enforce the exact settlement parent between ordered artifact refs and the final ledger parent

preservation_contract: all original envelope and semantic amendment constraints acceptance commands and stop conditions remain active
added source performs read-only structural and integrity validation and never writes a registry ledger or domain outcome
all prior invalid missing reordered duplicate forged settlement and ledger parent cases remain fail closed
no backward-compatible parent shape optional settlement bypass default or fallback is added
no payload schema contract event table column dependency config workflow or domain source changes
acceptance_commands: python3 -m unittest tests.test_stage1_admission tests.test_stage1_assurance tests.test_stage1_authority_policy tests.test_stage1_control_assurance tests.test_stage1_execution tests.test_stage1_execution_assurance tests.test_stage1_ledger tests.test_stage1_pause_epoch_fencing tests.test_stage1_validation tests.test_stage1_validation_assurance tests.test_stage1_reference_vertical -v
exact fifteen-file write-set settlement-parent order missing forged reordered duplicate parent negative scan plus contract dependency private-locator network live-authority and weakening scan
rollback: Agent 0 discards the worker commit and reverts this four-file compatibility authority. No runtime database, domain registry, scientific outcome, external system or live authority is changed.
